lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's through those broken bars?

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Well, my intrepid friend, through those broken bars lies a most remarkable discovery! I named it Scurrius, The Rat King!

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: This is no ordinary rat. It is a magnificent creature of evolution, forged by the unwitting contributions of adventurers who entered its cave.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: It absorbed their combat abilities, transforming itself into an obscene monster. Nature's response to intrusion, you might say! How utterly fascinating!

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Ahem, anyway you'll be absolutely fine, of course! Your victory awaits, I'm sure. I shall observe your progress with interest... for science, you know.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Oh, and if you happen to come across Scurrius' spine, please bring it to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me, can you tell me about Scurrius' spine?

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Of course! Scurrius spines are invaluable for my research.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: I can use them to craft a potent bone weapon which will aid you when battling the Rat King.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Although you can create the weapons yourself, provided you have the required expertise and appropriate materials.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: If you don't want a bone weapon, I can also trade you a lamp I found during my research expedition - one for every Scurrius spine you bring to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make a bone weapon for me please?

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: You'll need to bring a Scurrius spine and either a Rune mace, a Yew shortbow, or a Battlestaff. An additional 1000 chaos runes are needed if you want to create a Bone staff.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: I'll also charge 50,000 coins to craft the weapon.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Come back when you have all the necessary materials.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Okay, I'll make you the Bone mace.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Okay, I'll make you the Bone shortbow.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Okay, I'll make you the Bone staff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

sections.title: Using Scurrius' spine on Historian Aldo

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Ah, a Scurrius spine! A captivating subject indeed. I'll eagerly take them off your hands, and rest assured, you will be well rewarded.

lines.speaker: Historian Aldo
lines.text: Ah, I'll need one of Scurrius' spines to do that. Perhaps you could fetch me one?
